story.iWant: to see generation status update in real-time
story.soThat: I know when my scripts/audio are ready without refreshing

task.title: Enhance StatusBadge component with animations
task.subtask: Add spinning icon for SCRIPT_GENERATING and AUDIO_GENERATING states
Add animate-pulse class to generating status badges
Add checkmark icon (✓) for SCRIPT_COMPLETED and COMPLETED states
Add X icon (✕) for FAILED states
Ensure icons are accessible with aria-labels

task.title: Implement dynamic polling in CourseDetail connect.ts
task.subtask: Add refetchInterval callback function to useQuery
Implement hasGeneratingLessons helper function
Return 5000ms interval when generating, false otherwise
Add previousLessonsRef to track status changes between polls

task.title: Implement status change detection
task.subtask: Create usePreviousLessons hook or useRef to store previous data
Compare current vs previous lesson statuses on each poll
Detect transitions: GENERATING → COMPLETED, GENERATING → FAILED
Extract lesson titles for notification messages

task.title: Add toast notifications for status changes
task.subtask: Show success toast "Script ready for [title]" on SCRIPT_COMPLETED
Show success toast "Audio ready for [title]" on COMPLETED (audio)
Show error toast "Generation failed for [title]" on FAILED
Handle multiple simultaneous transitions (multiple toasts)

task.title: Create polling constants
task.subtask: Add constants.ts to CourseDetail container
Define POLLING_INTERVAL = 5000 constant
Define GENERATING_STATUSES array

task.title: Update LessonReorder to support polling
task.subtask: Ensure pending order state resets when polled data changes
Verify reorder state handles status transitions correctly
Handle case where generating lesson becomes COMPLETED

task.title: Testing and validation
task.subtask: Run bun typecheck - verify no type errors
Run bun lint:fix - verify no lint errors
Manual test: verify generating lessons show animated badge
Manual test: verify polling stops when no generating lessons
Manual test: verify toast appears on status completion
Manual test: verify toast error appears on failure
Manual test: verify multiple generating lessons poll correctly
Manual test: navigate away and back, verify polling resumes

criterion.given: a lesson has status SCRIPT_GENERATING or AUDIO_GENERATING
criterion.then: - The status badge shows a pulse/spinner animation (blue #7aa2f7) - The badge displays the generating status text with spinning icon

criterion.given: lessons are in a generating state
criterion.when: I view the course detail page
criterion.then: - React Query polls the course endpoint every 5 seconds - Polling is automatic and requires no user interaction

criterion.when: a lesson's status changes to SCRIPT_COMPLETED
criterion.then: - Polling stops for that lesson (no more generating lessons) - Badge updates to orange (#e0af68) with checkmark icon - Toast notification: "Script ready for [lesson title]"

criterion.when: a lesson's status changes to COMPLETED
criterion.then: - Polling stops for that lesson - Badge updates to green (#9ece6a) with checkmark icon - Toast notification: "Audio ready for [lesson title]"

criterion.when: a lesson's status changes to FAILED
criterion.then: - Polling stops for that lesson - Badge updates to red (#f7768e) with X icon - Toast error: "Generation failed for [lesson title]"

criterion.given: no lessons are in SCRIPT_GENERATING or AUDIO_GENERATING status
criterion.then: - Polling is disabled (no unnecessary API calls) - No refetchInterval is set on the query
- Toast notification appears for the completed lesson - Polling continues for remaining generating lessons - All status updates are tracked independently

criterion.given: I navigate away and return to the course detail page
criterion.then: - Polling resumes if any lessons are still generating - The correct generating animation is displayed

doc.title: Product Requirements Document
doc.snippet: Toast notifications for actions, loading states and progress indicators, error messages with recovery options, success confirmations.

doc.title: Architecture Document
doc.snippet: Simple polling for generation progress tracking. Use refetchInterval option in React Query with callback function that returns 5000 when generating or false otherwise.

doc.title: Architecture Document
doc.snippet: Toast Notifications (Sonner 2.0.7): Success: Green toast, 4s auto-dismiss. Error: Red toast, 6s auto-dismiss. Warning: Orange toast, 5s auto-dismiss. Info: Blue toast, 4s auto-dismiss.

doc.title: UX Design Specification
doc.snippet: Success: #9ece6a (Published, completed, success messages). Warning: #e0af68 (In progress, draft, caution states). Error: #f7768e (Failed, errors, destructive actions). Info: #7aa2f7 (Processing, informational states).

doc.title: UX Design Specification
doc.snippet: Loading States: Badge with animate-pulse class from Tailwind. Toast notifications triggered by comparing previous vs current status. Real-time polling updates via 5s interval.

doc.title: Epic Breakdown
doc.snippet: Use refetchInterval option in React Query with dynamic callback. Badge with animate-pulse class from Tailwind. Toast notifications triggered by comparing previous vs current status.

doc.title: Story 3.5 - Previous Story
doc.snippet: LessonReorder container created for reorder state management. pendingOrder state must be preserved during polling updates. Cache invalidation with refetchLessons() works - polling will use same pattern.

doc.title: Copilot Instructions
doc.snippet: Containers have connect.ts for ALL logic (API calls, forms, effects). Components are pure presentational. Rule: Polling logic goes in connect.ts.

file.reason: Primary file to modify. Already has status config with colors and icons. Need to add pulse animation for GENERATING states and verify icon assignments match UX spec. Currently uses Loader2 with animate-spin for generating, Check for completed, X for failed.

Main file for polling logic. Currently uses $api.useQuery without refetchInterval. Need to add dynamic refetchInterval callback, previousLessonsRef for status change detection, and useEffect for toast notifications on status transitions.
Existing constants file. Need to add POLLING_INTERVAL = 5000 and GENERATING_STATUSES array.

Related file for understanding reorder state management. getReorderState computes displayLessons from pendingOrder. Polling should update lessons without resetting pendingOrder unless explicit user action.
Renders lesson list with StatusBadge. Receives displayLessons from parent. Status changes from polling will automatically reflect through this component.
Lesson type from OpenAPI. The status field comes from API response as LessonStatus enum values.
React Query configuration. Default staleTime is 5min, gcTime is 10min. refetchOnWindowFocus is disabled by default. Polling will override these for lessons query.
OpenAPI client with auth middleware. Used for all API calls. The useQuery hook from $api supports refetchInterval option.

ecosystem.name: node
ecosystem.package: Server state management with polling support via refetchInterval
Icons including Loader2, Check, X, Circle
Auto-generated React Query hooks from OpenAPI

constraints.constraint: All polling logic MUST go in connect.ts following Container Pattern. StatusBadge component remains pure presentational.
Use $api.useQuery from openapi-react-query - never write manual fetch calls.
Status change detection uses React refs (useRef) to compare previous vs current lesson statuses.
Use refetchInterval callback function (not static value) to dynamically enable/disable polling based on generating lessons.
Toast notifications must use sonner library (toast.success, toast.error) - no other notification libraries.
Animation classes use Tailwind utilities: animate-spin for spinning icons, animate-pulse for badge pulse effect.
Polling should NOT reset pendingOrder state. Only reset on explicit user actions (add/edit/delete lessons).
All status icons must have aria-hidden="true" since the status text provides the accessible name.
Run bun typecheck and bun lint:fix before marking story complete.

interface.name: Lessons Query with Polling
Toast API

tests.standards:
Per project testing standards, this story requires manual testing to verify: - Animated badge appears for GENERATING statuses with pulse animation - Polling interval is 5000ms when generating lessons exist - Polling stops when no generating lessons remain - Toast notifications appear for each status transition - Multiple simultaneous transitions show multiple toasts - Navigation away and back preserves correct state - Reorder state is preserved during polling updates - Accessibility: animated icons have aria-hidden="true"
Run bun typecheck and bun lint:fix before completing story.

locations.location: tests/ (Playwright e2e tests - not required for this story)
Manual testing via browser developer tools

ideas.idea: Verify StatusBadge renders with animate-pulse class for GENERATING statuses
Verify Loader2 icon has animate-spin class for spinning effect
Verify network tab shows polling requests every 5s when generating
Mock status change and verify toast appears with correct message
Verify no polling requests when all lessons have static status
Test with multiple lessons in GENERATING state, verify independent tracking
Navigate to /courses and back, verify polling resumes if lessons still generating
